hero.subtitle: Neural Matrix_01 / Boutique
hero.description: Industrial grade virtual instruments engineered for the next era of sound design. Precision emulations and aseptic neural engines.

philosophy.title: Engineering
philosophy.description: At ABD, we don't just replicate instruments; we model the physical laws of sound. Our <bold>Zero-Latency Spectral Engine™</bold> ensures that every harmonic interaction happens in real-time, providing the tactile response of analog hardware with the infinite precision of digital mathematics.
philosophy.f1_desc: 64-bit internal floating-point processing for artifact-free modulation.
philosophy.f2_desc: Full M1/M2/M3 native optimization with zero-allocation memory management.
philosophy.side_desc: Every instrument is a limited digital research project. We prioritize character over mass-market appeal.

features.f1_desc: Every component is modeled with absolute fidelity to the original circuits.
features.f2_desc: Optimized for real-time performance without compromising on sound quality.
features.f3_desc: Get immediate access to our latest research engines during the development phase.

catalog.title: The
catalog.description: Explore our collection of hardware-authentic emulations and next-generation synthesis platforms.

connect.title: Research
connect.description: Our lab is constantly evolving. For technical inquiries, alpha testing access, or collaborative research, dispatch your transmission through our terminal.
